title: Jumpmoore Kingdom Modpack
description: This is the official modpack for the amazing minecraft server Jumpmoore! The IP for the server is play.jumpmoore.net, and the website is jumpmoore.net. All of these mods are simply quality of life and performance. We also added a few shaders!
body:
This is the official modpack for the amazing minecraft server Jumpmoore! 
- The IP for the server is play.jumpmoore.net.
- The website is https://jumpmoore.net. 

All of these mods are simply quality of life and performance. We also added a few shaders. We hope to see you on the server!
